narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp I (precinct in Summit County) has 970 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
